TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Taluk, title = Taluk, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taluk} }

S.FORM: alang Taluk ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 169 buwan, 629 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 583 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 46 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Amis 2%, Tayan 1%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Taluk hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taluk hya' ga Lamuan. tay mkyahu' na Taluk hya' ga Saiku. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Taluk ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Taluk maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Taluk ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 169 buwan, 629 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 583 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 46 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Amis 2%, Tayan 1%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Taluk hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taluk hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taluk hya' ga Lamuan. tay mkyahu' na Taluk hya' ga Saiku. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Taluk ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Taluk maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ taluk ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na taluk ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na taluk ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na taluk ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taluk ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taluk ħjaʔ ɣa lamuan. taj mkjaħuʔ na taluk ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaiku. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ taluk ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ taluk maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
